title: Gilgamesh, Enkidu, and the Netherworld
description: Enkidu's ghost returns from the underworld to describe the fates of the dead: a bleak Sumerian afterlife.
introduction: Enkidu's ghost returns from the underworld to describe the fates of the dead: a bleak Sumerian afterlife.

translation.text: Did you see the man with one son? He weeps by the wall. Did you see the man with seven sons? He sits among the gods on a throne.
